title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: A Mixture of Experts podcast episode hosted by Tim Hwang featuring analysis of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and its tier routing system, Apple's announced shift to cloud-based AI via NVIDIA partnership at WWDC 2026, and debate on whether AI models can detect sarcasm through multimodal inputs versus context alone.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode, hosted by Tim Hwang, breaks down three developments: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and its tier routing system, Apple's announced shift toward cloud-based AI through an NVIDIA partnership at WWDC 2026, and a debate over whether AI models can detect sarcasm. The routing discussion covers how tiers direct queries within Claude Fable 5, while the Apple segment addresses the move from on-device toward cloud integration. The sarcasm portion weighs multimodal inputs against context alone as the basis for detection.
